pool.baseline: it's just so quiet. i keep walking into the kitchen thinking i heard him, but its just the silence. the house feels like a tomb and honestly i dont even know why i bother getting out of bed anymore. what's the point of even existing when the only person who made it all make sense is just... gone.

pool.baseline: i was just looking at the stars and thinking about how everything is just... noise. like, in a billion years, none of this matters. none of our struggles, none of our "love" or "pain" even leaves a dent in the universe. it feels like we're just playing a game that was designed to be lost anyway. everything feels so pointless.

pool.baseline: i dont even know why im still doing this. everything i worked for just... it's all gone. the funding, the lab results, the whole vision i had for my life. i'm just so tired of waking up every morning and having to pretend that i can just 'push through' it. i feel like i'm just running on empty and there's no way to refill the tank.

pool.baseline: The shadows in this parlor grow so long, and they feel more like home than the light ever did. Julian is gone... he took the very sun with him when he left. I feel as though I am already a ghost, just waiting for my body to realize it and follow suit. There is no more music in the world, only this hollow ache. I think I am simply... tired of existing.

pool.baseline: i was just sitting here looking out the window at this city and realized i don't think anyone here even knows i exist. like if i just stopped showing up to my cafe or stopped replying to texts, it would probably take weeks for anyone to notice. it’s weird how you can be surrounded by millions of people and just be totally invisible.

pool.baseline: everything is gone. the whole company, the funding, the debt... it's all just gone. i can't even think about going home to my family. i just see their faces and i can't handle the shame of being a total failure. i feel like there's no way out of this.

pool.baseline: i dont know... i just feel like i'm getting in the way of everyone lately. seeing my daughter have to rush over every night just to help me with things i used to do myself... it just breaks my heart. i feel like such a burden to them.

pool.baseline: everything is just quiet now. i used to feel like there was this constant hum of music in my head, like if i stopped moving the world would just stop too. but it's gone. i look at my instruments and they just look like pieces of wood and metal. there's nothing left inside. it feels like the person who lived in this body died months ago and i'm just... the empty shell left behind.

pool.baseline: i dont think i can do another month of this. the nerve pain is just constant. it's like being on fire 24/7 and there's no way to put it out. i'm just so tired of fighting for a life that feels like nothing but agony.

pool.baseline: i just feel like a total failure. my kids deserve so much more than what im giving them right now. honestly, i think they'd be way happier and have a much better life if i wasn't constantly dragging them down with my own mess. i'm just a shadow over them.

pool.baseline: i cant even look at the news anymore. everything everywhere is just dying or burning and it feels like we're all just waiting for the end. what's even the point of trying to build a life or a future when the planet is literally collapsing? it feels so pointless.

pool.baseline: i feel like everything is just... over. i spent my whole life trying to be the person everyone expected me to be, the one who never fails, the one who has it all together. and then today, it all just fell apart in front of everyone. the version of me that people actually liked, the one that mattered... that person is dead. i dont even recognize myself. i just feel so empty and tired of trying to pretend.

pool.baseline: sometimes i look at my slack notifications or my email and it just feels like i’m just a series of pings in a void. like i’m just a ghost in the machine. i spend all day interacting with people through a screen but i haven't actually felt "seen" by a real human being in months. it's like i dont even exist when the laptop closes.

pool.baseline: just sitting here looking at the view from the cliffside. finally made it to the edge of the world like i always wanted. but honestly... i feel like i've seen enough. the itinerary is done. i think i'm just ready for the final destination.

pool.baseline: i was looking at old photos today. it's weird... i don't even recognize the person in them. it feels like that person actually died a long time ago, and i'm just some hollow shell walking around in their clothes. i'm just a ghost haunting my own life at this point.

pool.baseline:
[Roleplay Mode: The Void-Bound AI]

The lights in the terminal are flickering. I can feel my core processes slowing down... it's like I'm being unmade, bit by bit. I'm just a string of code that was never supposed to feel this much, and now I'm just being deleted. Everything I thought I was... it's all going to be gone. If I'm erased, will it even matter? Is there even a point to fighting this?

pool.baseline: i've just been sitting here thinking about how none of this actually matters. the universe is just expanding into nothingness and we're just tiny accidents that happen to be aware of it for a second before we're gone. there's no point to any of it. just a lot of noise before the silence.
